name: roomio-camera-flythrough
description: Agent B work-stream 2: virtual camera + flythrough for Roomio. First-person walk, top-down director, Catmull-Rom waypoint paths, smooth playback, deterministic frame-by-frame MP4 export. Client-side Three.js; renders Agent A's live scene via the /shared/scene_contract.json bus, or a faithful local harness for dev. NOT NeRF.

scripts.verify: for s in walk director path playback capture download record; do node scripts/verify-$s.mjs || exit 1; done
